outline: Day 1: lower-body machines plus short easy cardio
Day 2: upper-body machines plus short easy cardio
Day 3: cardio-focused session with one or two simple accessories
why: Simple plans should stay repeatable and avoid overwhelming the user with too many moving parts.
caution: Treat the plan as a starting structure and adjust volume gradually.

question_patterns: give me a simple day of meals
outline: Breakfast: one repeatable higher-fiber balanced option
Lunch: a whole-grain plus legumes or protein-supportive bowl
Dinner: a practical lighter evening meal
Snack: one simple filling option if needed
why: Day plans should give a usable shape rather than pretending there is one perfect menu.
caution: Use the plan as a practical template and swap meals according to the user goal.
